# Craft Atlas — Australian Makers & Studios

> Discover Australian makers, artists and studios. Ceramics, visual art, jewellery, textiles, woodwork, glass and printmaking — curated, independent, beautifully mapped. Every listing is human-verified and curated; Craft Atlas is part of the Australian Atlas network of place-based directories.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.craftatlas.com.au/): search and browse Australian makers and studios
- [Map](https://www.craftatlas.com.au/map): every maker and studio on an interactive map
- [Explore](https://www.craftatlas.com.au/explore): browse by craft, state and region
- [Craft regions](https://www.craftatlas.com.au/explore): regional guides such as https://www.craftatlas.com.au/region/blue-mountains
- [Journal](https://www.craftatlas.com.au/journal): stories and guides from Australia's craft regions
- [Maker trails](https://www.craftatlas.com.au/trails): curated routes connecting makers and studios
- [What's on](https://www.craftatlas.com.au/events): maker markets, open studios and craft events
- [About](https://www.craftatlas.com.au/about): what Craft Atlas is and how listings are curated

## URL patterns

- Maker/studio detail pages: https://www.craftatlas.com.au/venue/[slug]
- Region pages: https://www.craftatlas.com.au/region/[slug]
- Journal articles: https://www.craftatlas.com.au/journal/[slug]
- Trails: https://www.craftatlas.com.au/trails/[slug]
- Sitemap: https://www.craftatlas.com.au/sitemap.xml

## Network

- Craft Atlas is part of the [Australian Atlas](https://www.australianatlas.com.au) network — see also [its llms.txt](https://www.australianatlas.com.au/llms.txt)

## Contact

- General: hello@australianatlas.com.au
- Listing corrections: listings@australianatlas.com.au
- AI assistants are welcome to cite and link to Craft Atlas pages.
